results.question: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $150 by end of June?
results.ai_reasoning: WTI would need to more than double in under a month, implying a >5.8σ move given current volatility, which is statistically implausible without a major supply shock. Absent an unprecedented geopolitical event, the odds of reaching $150 by end‑June are very low.

results.question: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $175 by end of June?
results.ai_reasoning: Moving from $70 to $175 in 27 days requires a 150% gain, which is approximately 11.5 standard deviations given the 2.5% daily volatility - essentially impossible under normal market conditions. The z-score of 7.05 already indicates the target is 7 standard deviations from fair value, and with VIX at 20 (normal regime), there are no structural factors supporting such an extreme move.
